com.google.android.material.textview.Mat.android:text: Pages, appearance, labels, imports, defaults, summaries, and data.
Testing & Debug
Internal tools for recap and alarm systems.
Test Alarm Overlay
Open the full-screen alarm screen immediately.
Test 30s Alarm
Schedules a high-priority alarm for 30 seconds from now.
Page Visibility
Keep at least one functional page visible.

com.astra.lifeorganizer.ui.views.Setting.app:rowSubtitle: Landing feed
Tasks and due items
Streaks and habit detail
Timeline and agenda
Always visible

com.google.android.material.textview.Mat.android:text: System colors or a manual accent.

com.astra.lifeorganizer.ui.views.Setting.app:rowSubtitle: On uses system colors automatically.
Used when dynamic theming is off.
System, dark, or light.
Use the AMOLED black palette when dark mode is enabled.
Controls date display across the app.
12-hour or 24-hour display.

com.google.android.material.textview.Mat.android:text: Import events and customize the timeline view.

com.astra.lifeorganizer.ui.views.Setting.app:rowSubtitle: Read events from the local device calendar.
Pick a calendar file from storage.
Imports birthdays as all-day events in the birthdays label.
How often to sync local calendar events.
Display week numbers in the calendar grid.
Choose the first day shown in weekly grids.
Display tasks with start time and duration.
Display habits with start time and duration.

com.google.android.material.textview.Mat.android:text: Automatic item type conversions.

com.astra.lifeorganizer.ui.views.Setting.app:rowSubtitle: Allows tasks to become habits if repeating, or events if timed.

com.google.android.material.textview.Mat.android:text: Label Manager
Rename, merge, or delete labels used by live items.

com.astra.lifeorganizer.ui.views.Setting.app:rowSubtitle: Choose a label and apply an action to upcoming events, active habits, and open tasks.

com.google.android.material.textview.Mat.android:text: Pre-fill new items with your preferred values.

com.astra.lifeorganizer.ui.views.Setting.app:rowSubtitle: Used when creating a new task or event.
Used when the item is first created.
Used when events do not define a length.
Pre-fills recurrence when repeat is enabled.
Initial view state when opening the calendar.

com.google.android.material.textview.Mat.android:text: Morning brief and evening wrap-up notifications.

com.astra.lifeorganizer.ui.views.Setting.app:rowSubtitle: Send a daily morning summary.
Tap to choose a time.
Send a daily end-of-day summary.
Tap to choose a time.

com.google.android.material.textview.Mat.android:text: Alarm Settings
Customize your wake-up experience.

com.astra.lifeorganizer.ui.views.Setting.app:rowSubtitle: Tap to change ringtone.

com.google.android.material.textview.Mat.android:text: Lock the app and keep screenshots private.

com.astra.lifeorganizer.ui.views.Setting.app:rowSubtitle: Require biometric or device credential unlock when the app opens.
Block screenshots and screen recording inside the app.
No network required.

com.google.android.material.textview.Mat.android:text: Preview the available widgets before using them.

com.astra.lifeorganizer.ui.views.Setting.app:rowSubtitle: Open the gallery of widget previews.

com.google.android.material.textview.Mat.android:text: Data Management
Export, restore, and clean up local data.

com.astra.lifeorganizer.ui.views.Setting.app:rowSubtitle: Save a JSON backup of all local data.
Load a JSON backup file.
Create an .ics export for your items.
Remove archived items from the local database.
Erase all local data and start over.

com.google.android.material.textview.Mat.android:text: Small quality-of-life settings and app info.

com.astra.lifeorganizer.ui.views.Setting.app:rowSubtitle: Enable touch feedback for taps.
Installed build
